action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 2 found that load_env is in VLABench.envs, not VLABench directly. We need to fix smoke_test.py, complete predict.py (was truncated), and start training. Analysis: The pipeline needs (1) corrected env import, (2) a complete predict.py that bridges Pi0 to VLABench with action chunking and postprocessing, (3) a train.py fix to avoid OOM by only optimizing trainable LoRA params and reducing batch size. Decision: Update all three files, run smoke_test + 250-step training, and submit eval to get baseline success_rate and measure eval wall-clock time.
